title: BloodyPack by Ortmelone
description: Themed for diffrent kinds of Blood.
body:
## The ressourcepack changes many diffrent aspects of survivle minecraft but focuses on Mace PvP.


### Animated Pots,
### Custom Crosshair, 
### Custom Windcharge explosions,
### Old enchant glint on armor,
### Low fire,


### Survival features like: No water fog, ore outlines, visible snow powder.
## **And much more.**


Pictures made by Gabfs.  Texturepack created by me Ortmelone.


If any issues occur Dm me on discord "ortmelone1"
If yall want updates, like my post and maybe dm me Ideas of changes and adds.
